title: rubus koehleri var. squalidus
intro: Rubus koehleri var. squalidus, also known as Japanese bramble, is a species of bramble that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in Eastern medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus koehleri var. squalidus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
